Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: d = json.loads\(line\) if d.get\('type'\) == 'summary': print\(d.get\('summary', ''\)\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: try: d = json.loads\(line\) msg_type = d.get\('type', ''\) if msg_type in \('user', 'assistant'\): role = d.get\('role', msg_type\) content = d.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = c.get\('text', ''\)[:300] print\(f'[{role}]: {text}'\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
